hero.intro: We tailor precise insurance and investment plans to every client's needs.
hero.imageAlt: Professional financial advisors discussing plans in a bright modern office

life.title: Life insurance
life.tagline: Financial security for your family's future
life.description: Term and endowment policies so your family's lifestyle continues and their dreams stay within reach—even when you're not there.

health.title: Health insurance
health.tagline: Protection from hospital costs—with cashless care
health.description: Leave financial worry at the door when illness strikes. Cashless treatment at leading hospitals and family floater plans available.

investment.title: Investment plans
investment.description: Secure, growth-oriented investment plans for goals like education, marriage, or retirement.

vehicle.title: Vehicle insurance
vehicle.description: Third-party and comprehensive cover for cars and two-wheelers, with prompt claim support for accidents or theft.
